product_definition.title: Health & Damage System
product_definition.description: A GAS-based health, damage, and status effect system for UE5.5. Supports multiple damage types, damage modifiers, shield layer, regeneration, death handling, and hit reactions. Integrates with Gameplay Ability System.
product_definition.target_audience: Action, RPG, and shooter game developers

core_features: UHealthAttributeSet: Health, MaxHealth, Shield, MaxShield, Regen
Damage types as GameplayEffects: Physical, Fire, Poison, True
Status effects: Burning, Poisoned, Stunned, Slowed via GE
Shield layer that absorbs damage before health
Health regeneration via GE with period
Death handling with ragdoll and respawn policy
Hit reaction montage trigger on damage received

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Player applies damage to dummy, health bar updates, status effect applied
